text.title: Business Process Analysis — Enterprise Scale and Governance Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the business-process-analysis methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check + sourced rationale and is referenced from `content/06-decision-tree.xml`.

rule.statement: Step 1 (identify and rank): Score every process by nva_minutes_per_year × strategic_fit; pick top-decile for deep modelling; narrative the rest.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the identify and rank gate.

rule.statement: Step 2 (document current state): For each deep-tier process apply elicitation + frontline-validation; capture VA/BN/NVA per step; log every workaround.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the document current state gate.

rule.statement: Step 3 (analyze): Compute va_pct/bn_pct/nva_pct + cycle/touch/cost ratios; identify pain points (no inference).
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the analyze gate.

rule.statement: Step 4 (design future state): Produce structured diff table; for ERP gaps follow adopt→configure→extend→build order.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the design future state gate.

rule.statement: Step 5 (validate and sign off): Portfolio-agent reviews; process owner signs off; commit BPMN XML to source control; tag release.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the validate and sign off gate.

rule.statement: When portfolio_size < 100 AND audit_required == false, do: Pareto-cut: deep-model only top decile by nva_minutes_per_year, narrative-document the rest.
rule.rationale: Codified from the decision-tree verdict; this rule binds the gate condition to a concrete, testable action so the routing remains auditable.

rule.statement: When scenario == "ERP", do: Enforce adopt→configure→extend→build order; document each gap with explicit decision type.
rule.rationale: Codified from the decision-tree verdict; this rule binds the gate condition to a concrete, testable action so the routing remains auditable.

rule.statement: When scenario == "M&A", do: Add per-L2 ownership decision log citing deal-thesis for every acquirer/target/hybrid choice.
rule.rationale: Codified from the decision-tree verdict; this rule binds the gate condition to a concrete, testable action so the routing remains auditable.

rule.statement: If preconditions for business-process-analysis do not hold, do not apply this methodology; route to an alternative as the decision tree suggests.
rule.rationale: Methodologies misapplied to wrong contexts create overhead without value; explicit skip preserves the agent's budget.
